scenes.narration: 晨光洒在教室的窗台上，苏晓推开窗户，深吸一口清新的空气。
scenes.image_prompt: anime style, a classroom interior at sunrise, soft golden light streaming through large windows, empty desks, peaceful atmosphere
scenes.video_prompt: slow pan across classroom, gentle camera movement from window to desks
scenes.character_description: Su Xiao: a young high school girl with long black hair, wearing a clean white shirt and navy skirt, gentle expression

scenes.narration: 林然抱着课本走进教室，看到苏晓，露出温暖的笑容。
scenes.image_prompt: anime style, a boy entering a sunlit classroom holding textbooks, smiling warmly at a girl by the window
scenes.video_prompt: medium shot, slow dolly in toward the boy
scenes.character_description: Lin Ran: a teenage boy with short brown hair, wearing school uniform, kind smile

scenes.narration: 两人相视而笑，窗外的樱花随风飘落。
scenes.image_prompt: anime style, two students smiling at each other in a classroom, cherry blossom petals drifting outside the window, soft warm light
scenes.video_prompt: close-up on faces, slow zoom in, soft focus background
scenes.character_description: Su Xiao and Lin Ran standing together, maintaining consistent character designs from previous scenes
